message:
test(counting_writer): add 20 edge-case tests for CountingWriter, PresentStats, StatsCollector (bd-19pkj)

Cover CountingWriter Debug/inner_mut/empty-write/multiple-resets/u64-accumulation/
multiple-flushes/into_inner-data/initial-state, PresentStats Debug/Clone/Eq/
log-noop/large-values/fractional-ratios/exact-budget-boundary, constants
verification, expected_max_bytes pathological cases, StatsCollector Debug/
zero-cells/immediate-finish.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
